name: GLIMER 1MG TAB 1*15TAB
description: Anti-diabetic medicine containing glimepiride used for lowering blood glucose in type 2 diabetes when diet and exercise alone are insufficient.
uses: Blood glucose control when lifestyle modifications fail
dosage: Prescribed by doctor; take with or after meals; swallow whole with water.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature in original package; keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: GLIZID 80 1*15TAB
description: An anti-diabetic medicine containing gliclazide used for treating type 2 diabetes mellitus.
uses: Blood sugar reduction when lifestyle modifications fail
dosage: Take as a whole tablet with water before meals, as directed by doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: CETAPIN XR 500 TAB 1*20
description: An oral antidiabetic medicine used to lower raised blood sugar levels in type 2 diabetes.
uses: Blood sugar control in overweight patients
dosage: Take as prescribed by your doctor, preferably after meals. Swallow whole with water at fixed times.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a cool and dry place. Protect from light and moisture.

name: GLUCONORM P 15 1*10
description: An anti-diabetic medication taken orally to improve control of blood sugar levels in adults with Type 2 diabetes.
uses: Type 2 diabetes mellitus management in adults
dosage: Take as a whole tablet with water exactly as prescribed by doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: GLUCORED TAB 1*10TAB
description: An anti-diabetic medicine containing a combination of Glibenclamide and Metformin, used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus.
dosage: As directed by doctor; swallow whole with water and food; fixed timing recommended.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature protected from moisture and heat.

name: MELMET-500 SR 1*20TAB
description: Used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus when diet and exercise have not controlled blood glucose levels.
dosage: Swallow tablets whole with water, taken with or after meals at fixed times as directed by a doctor.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: TRAJENTA DUO 500 TAB
description: An anti-diabetic medicine used to manage type 2 diabetes, enhancing insulin response and reducing blood sugar levels.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; swallow whole with water, with or after meals, at the same time daily.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, below 30°C.

name: DAPANORM M 10 1*10
description: An anti-diabetic medication prescribed to help manage Type 2 diabetes mellitus in adults, alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise.
uses: Type 2 diabetes mellitus management in adults
Blood sugar control when combined with diet and exercise
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: SITARED M 50/500 1*15
description: A medication used to manage type 2 diabetes, combining metformin and sitagliptin to control blood sugar levels.
uses: Control high blood sugar in type 2 diabetes mellitus
Used alongside healthy diet and regular exercise
dosage: Take with food as prescribed by doctor.
storageInstructions: Store at a temperature not above 30°C in a cool and dry place.

name: SUPERMET AM 1*10
description: Combination medicine used for the treatment of high blood pressure and angina pectoris.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor at a fixed time; can be taken with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.
